stages.objective: Observe async terminal write completion path.
stages.goal: Verify write-related wakeup and trap return events.
stages.theory_detail: Write may block on device completion; IRQ wakeup resumes progress.

hints.nudge: Find sys.write and wakeup in trace.
hints.concept: Asynchronous completion separates request time from resume time.
hints.explicit: Run until sys.write, proc.wakeup, and trap.return all appear.

stages.objective: Diagnose completion after asynchronous write flow.
stages.goal: Pass event and completion checks for write scenario.

hints.concept: Event visibility is necessary but completion is still required.

stages.objective: Tune device latency and preserve correctness.

hints.concept: Latency alters timing, not correctness constraints.
hints.explicit: Apply one latency change, rerun, and re-check all validators.
